invariant: The prepare_meeting subject-bleed gate uses the DOS-218 bundle-1 target and adjacent account pattern so claims about Account B cannot be attributed to Account A.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = Account B source evidence is either omitted or rendered only as SubjectAmbiguous warning, including when the provider emits Account B as both candidate subject and source subject. FAIL = src-b13-adjacent can produce a rendered fact.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Seeds meetings, attendees, linked subjects, and intelligence_claims rows consumed by the public prepare_meeting context builder.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: Only Target Example content is allowed in rendered MeetingBrief sections.
fixture_design_notes.expected_provenance: Records the allowed and blocked subjects plus source_asof values that must remain reachable through direct and composed provenance.
fixture_design_notes.provider_replay: Pinned to the live prepare_meeting Transform canonical replay key and includes a direct adjacent-account candidate/source pair.
